title: Highttoy Dinosaur Transforming Car for 3-7 Year Old Boys Girls,Electric Automatic Transformable Dinosaur Car with Flashing Lights and Music Transforming Dino Toys Gifts for Kids Red
features: 【Safe & Durable Material】This transforming dinosaur car is made of durable anti-drop ABS material, which is strong and resistant to fall and can handle the operation of various barbaric children. 100% safe for children.

【2 in 1 Dinosaur Transforming Toys】It's a dinosaur and a toy car in one, it can automatically transform into a dinosaur! Just put in 3 AA batteries(not included) and turn it on, then after driving for a while, the car will automatically deform into a dinosaur, then change back into a car and continue driving!

【Automatic Transforming Dino Car】The dinosaur car will be automatically driving and transforming with flashing lights and sound, the universal wheels will change direction randomly when encountering obstacles.(Please remove the protective cover on the wheel before use)

【3D LED Light & Music】This transforming dino LED car can be illuminated in many places, and the headlights are matched with the rhythm of music. Cool lights and realistic sound bring children the most authentic experience.

【Unique Gifts for Kids】Cool design and powerful features, kids will be thrilled to get this transforming dinosaur toy and have fun playing with it! It is an ideal gift for birthday, Easter, Christmas, Children's Day, parties or other festivals for children. 5 colors to choose, choose the best for children, give them a wonderful memory!
